name: pre-vibe
description: Agent first-turn context intake compiler for general, research, and coding workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Compile vague tasks into budgeted agent startup context.
interface.longDescription: pre-vibe prepares a token-disciplined first-turn context package with a handbook spec, project AGENTS guidance, and a compact first prompt that is injected only after user approval.
defaultPrompt: Use pre-vibe to turn this idea into an agent-ready spec.
Prepare a research task with pre-vibe.
Prepare this coding task for Codex.
